name: Security Full Implementation
description: Complete Odoo security implementation workflow: assess requirements, design groups and ACLs, add record rules, validate, and audit.

steps.name: Assess Security Requirements
steps.description: Map business roles, data sensitivity, and compliance needs to Odoo security concepts

steps.name: Design Group Structure
steps.description: Create security groups, categories, and implied group hierarchies

steps.name: Implement ACLs
steps.description: Define ir.model.access records for each model and role with least privilege

steps.name: Implement Record Rules
steps.description: Add ir.rule records for multi-company, ownership, and business-specific isolation

steps.name: Validate Security Configuration
steps.description: Run automated checks and manual tests for each role to confirm access levels

steps.name: Audit and Document
steps.description: Document groups, rules, and test results; schedule periodic security reviews
